summary: Diff adds a real OCR.space client and wires /ocr/upload to call it, plus updates global CSS tokens toward a purple theme. However, the OCR session utility (mockOcrExtractor) does not appear to be updated in the provided diff summary, and some implementation details (hardcoded API key, 1MB limit) were introduced without being requested.

missing_requirements.requirement: Update the OCR session utility (currently named/mock-behaving as a mock extractor) to support storing sessions created from real OCR results (extracted text + parsed questions) while keeping the existing session load/clear/convert APIs used by the OCR review screen.
missing_requirements.reason: The diff shows OCRUploadWireframe still calling `generateMockExtractedQuestions` and saving via `saveOCRSession` from `../../lib/ocr/mockOcrExtractor`, and OCRReviewApproveWireframe still loading via `loadOCRSession` from the same module, but no changes to that session utility file are shown/mentioned in the diff summary. Therefore it is not evidenced that the session utility was updated to handle real OCR results while preserving existing APIs and localStorage behavior.

hallucinated_features.description: Hardcoded OCR.space API key embedded in frontend source (`FREE_API_KEY = 'K87899142388957'`).
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest requires using OCR.space over HTTPS but does not request committing an API key into the client code (and this is a security/config concern not specified).

hallucinated_features.description: Client-side enforcement of a 1MB max file size for the 'free tier'.
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest did not require imposing a 1MB limit; it only required supporting image/PDF selection and performing OCR, with clear errors on failure. Adding a strict size cap is an unrequested product constraint.
